description.from: Quickly stabs the enemy, dealing 240*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 152% ATK P.DMG. On Crit Hit, applies [Wound] 1 stack and resets the cooldown. This skill’s DMG is increased by 20% per stack of [Wound].
description.to: Rapidly stabs the enemy, dealing ??? P.DMG. Upon a Crit Hit, stacks 1 Wound and resets cooldown. Per every stacked Wound, DMG dealt by Float Like a Butterfly is increased by 20%. Gains immunity to all DMG while the skill is in use.

description.from: Removes harmful effects from self and increases ATK by 205*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and Critical Hit Chance by 500 for 15sec.
description.to: Dispels negative effects from self and increases ATK by ??? for 20 sec and increases Crit Chance by 500. This effect cannot be dispelled.

description.from: Performs a series of attacks, dealing 320*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 202.7% ATK P.DMG 9 times, then finishes with a powerful thrust that deals 1918*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 1215.7% ATK P.DMG and knocks the enemy far away. The DMG of this skill is increased by 20% per stack of [Wound], and all stacks are consumed on the final hit.
description.to: Inflicts ??? P.DMG upon enemy with a continuous attack. The last hit blows the enemy away.

description.from: On a Critical Hit, increases ATK by 40*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) for 10sec. This effect stacks up to 8 times.
description.to: Upon a Crit Hit, ATK is increased by ??? for 10 sec. Can be stacked up to 8 times max.

light.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but the maximum number of [Wound Stacks] is increased to 10.
light.to: Mana cost is increased by 1 and Wound stack max is changed to 10. Deals 150% of ATK as extra DMG to enemies with 10 Wounds.

dark.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but the Critical Hit Chance increase effect is replaced with an effect that increases Critical Damage by 65%, and damage dealt to bosses is increased by 30%.
dark.to: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, Crit Chance effect is changed to a 100% Crit DMG boost. Also gains a 25% DMG boost towards Bosses.
When holding 5 stacks, takes 20% reduced DMG.

description.from: [Float Like a Butterfly] Increases DMG by {0}% and increases Armor Penetration by 800 while casting.
description.to: [Float Like a Butterfly] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces the target's P.Block chance by 500 for 10 sec.

description.from: [Sharp End] Increases ATK Boost by 50% and recovers additional {0} MP upon a Crit Hit for the Skill's duration.
description.to: [Sharp End] Increases ATK Boost by 50% and recovers additional {0} MP upon a Crit Hit for the skill's duration.

description.from: [Shooting Star] Increases DMG by {0}%, and adds 1 Wound per attack.
description.to: [Shooting Star] DMG is increased by {0}% and upon Crit Hit, mana is recovered by 200.

dark.from: When using a skill, has a 10% chance to increase your Critical Damage by 7%. This effect stacks up to 10 times.
dark.to: Upon using a Skill, increases own Crit DMG by 10% for 10 sec. This effect can be stacked up to max 10 times.

description.from: On each Crit Hit, increases own ATK Spd by {0}% and Crit DMG by {1}% for 15 sec. This effect stacks up to 8 times.
description.to: Upon a Crit Hit, ATK Spd is increased by {0} and Crit DMG is increased by {1}% for 15 sec. Can be stacked up to 5 times max.

description.from: Summons the soul of Lightning Flash, Livatis for 12sec, increasing own ATK by 45%. During the duration, increases DMG of [Float Like a Butterfly] by 25% and [Shooting Star] by 25%.
description.to: Summons the soul of Lightning Flash, Livatis, increasing own ATK by 60% for 12 sec. For the duration of Skill, increases DMG of Float Like a Butterfly by 50%.

2.to: Increases the duration of Skill by 5 sec and changes the Skill DMG Boost of Float Like a Butterfly to 100%.
